revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[Category:藤原氏|あたちし]]'
revision.text: [[Category:藤原氏|あたちし]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族|中臣氏|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|神道に関連する人物|中臣氏|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}}
[[安達氏]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:あたちし}} [[Category:日本の氏族]] [[Category:山蔭流]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}}
[[安達氏]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:あたちし}} [[Category:日本の氏族]] [[Category:山蔭流]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}}
{{Commonscat|Adachi clan}} {{Catmore}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あたちし}} [[Category:日本の氏族]] [[Category:山蔭流]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}}
{{Commonscat|Adachi clan}} {{Catmore}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あたちし}} [[Category:山蔭流]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|…|日本の氏族|藤原氏|藤原北家|魚名流|山蔭流}}
{{Commonscat|Adachi clan}} {{Catmore}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あたちし}} [[Category:山蔭流]] [[Category:鎌倉幕府御家人の氏族]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:tab went inactive so I need to add another category]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "tab went inactive so I need to add another category" to "qq"

revision.text:

revision.text:

{{DEFAULTSORT:あたちし}}
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:安達氏]]}}

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
